mapper.sql: ( CASE WHEN (SELECT CDCATE3 FROM ${userData.schema}.MCODEM WHERE COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND COMCDVL = #{item.itemcod}) = 'PLATE' THEN ( SELECT BA.ADDCOKY FROM ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BA WHERE ((BA.MINLENG = 0 OR BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) AND (BA.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{item.skuleng} < BA.MAXLENG)) AND ( CASE WHEN (SELECT ORWIDYN FROM ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT WHERE BTRCATE = #{item.btrcate}) = 'Y' THEN (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.grosswd}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.grosswd} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.grosswd}) ELSE (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.skuwidt} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) END ) AND BA.SYSCDYN = 'N' ) ELSE ( SELECT BAD.ADDCOKY FROM ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BAD WHERE BAD.SYSCDYN = 'Y' ) END )
mapper.select:
/* selectWasnhdKey */ SELECT WA.EOASNKY, WA.WAREKEY, WA.DOCCATE, WA.DOCTYPE, WA.ASNSTAT, WA.VEHICKY, WA.VHCFNAM, WA.PASTRKY, WA.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WASNHD WA WHERE WA.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WA.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky}
AND WA.ASNSTAT = #{param.asnstat}
mapper.insert:
/* insertWasnhdList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WASNHD(
EOASNKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, RSNCODE, PARSNNM, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, DRVERNM, HDSAVYN, ASNSTAT, ASNDATE, ASNTIME, ENTDATE, ENTTIME, ASNPIYN, PASTRKY, VHCFNAM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{item.eoasnky}, #{item.warekey}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.rsncode}, #{item.parsnnm}, #{item.vownkey}, #{item.vehicky}, IFNULL(#{item.drvernm}, ''), #{item.hdsavyn}, IFNULL(#{item.asnstat}, 'NEW'), date_format(#{item.asndate}, '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{item.asntime}, '%H:%i:%s'), '%H%i%s'), IFNULL(#{item.entdate}, ''), IFNULL(#{item.enttime}, ''), IFNULL(#{item.asnpiyn}, 'N'), #{item.pastrky}, ( SELECT VHCFNAM FROM ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA WHERE VOWNKEY = #{item.vownkey} AND VEHICKY = #{item.vehicky} LIMIT 1 ), date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: /* checkRelationship */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${userData.schema}.MEQLOC MEQL INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MEQUMA MEQ ON MEQL.WAREKEY = MEQ.WAREKEY AND MEQL.AREAKEY = MEQ.AREAKEY AND MEQL.EQUIPKY = MEQ.EQUIPKY WHERE MEQL.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND MEQL.AREAKEY = #{param.toareky} AND MEQL.LOCAKEY IN(#{param.tolocky}, #{param.ullocky}) AND MEQL.EQUIPKY = #{param.equipky} AND MEQL.ELUSEYN = 'Y' AND MEQ.EQUSEYN = 'Y' AND MEQ.EQUSTAT = 'NORMAL'
mapper.insert:
/* insertWasnitList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WASNIT(
EOASNKY, EOASNIT
, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , INVOICE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM , ASNITST, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , STLAYER, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG , SKUTHIC, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG , SKUSTRD, ULLOCKY, TOAREKY, TOLOCKY , TOLAYER, SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, ASNDQTY , RCHSQTY, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, REGIORG, REGIMOD , DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, ITEMCOD, PURCNUM , ORDERLN, BTRFSTC, STLOTNB , SHPLIMT, DELVDSR , STKMEMO, RESTKYN, SKUSTAT, RSNCODE , PARSNNM, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, DOCCATE , DOCTYPE, BTRCATE, FNCUSKY, GROSSTH , EQUIPKY , DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN , INDIMET, OUTDIMT, SERINUM , SAVEPOS, SCHDATE, MIXLOAD, DESTTRG , YARDTRG, INBDATE, INBVHNM, OUBVHNM , SHPDRNM, PRSALDT, CMPDATE, SHPPERS , OUBDATE, PREPRDE, ARVDATE, SHPODAT , TRSODAT
, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{item.eoasnky}, #{item.eoasnit} , #{item.warekey}, REPLACE(#{item.poshpdt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{item.poshptm}, ':', ''), #{item.poshpdy} , #{item.invoice}, IFNULL(#{item.ownerky},''), #{item.ownrnam} , IFNULL(#{item.asnitst}, 'NEW'), ( SELECT MG.SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG WHERE ((MG.MINLENG = 0 OR MG.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) AND (MG.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{item.skuleng} < MG.MAXLENG)) AND ((MG.MINWIDT = 0 OR MG.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) AND (MG.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.skuwidt} < MG.MAXWIDT)) AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' ), UPPER(#{item.skumkey}), #{item.skudesc}, IFNULL(#{item.stlayer}, #{item.eoasnit}), #{item.skuweig}, #{item.skuwidt}, #{item.skuleng}, #{item.skuthic}, #{item.grosswd}, #{item.grossln}, #{item.grosswg}, #{item.skustrd}, IFNULL(#{item.ullocky},''), IFNULL(#{item.toareky},''), IFNULL(#{item.tolocky},''), IF(#{item.tolayer} IS NULL OR #{item.tolayer} = 0, #{index} + 1, #{item.tolayer}), #{item.suomkey}, , #{item.asndqty}, #{item.rchsqty}, #{item.custcod}, #{item.custnam}, #{item.regiorg}, IF(#{item.regimod} = '' OR #{item.regimod} IS NULL , #{item.regiorg}, #{item.regimod}), #{item.destorg}, #{item.deorgnm}, IF(#{item.destmod} = '' OR #{item.destmod} IS NULL , #{item.destorg}, #{item.destmod}), IF(#{item.demodnm} = '' OR #{item.demodnm} IS NULL , #{item.deorgnm}, #{item.demodnm}), IF(#{item.destmod} = '' OR #{item.destmod} IS NULL, 'N', 'Y'), #{item.itemcod}, #{item.purcnum}, #{item.orderln}, IFNULL(#{item.btrfstc},''), IFNULL(#{item.stlotnb},''), IF(#{item.shplimt} IS NULL OR #{item.shplimt} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.shplimt}, '-', '')), IF(#{item.delvdsr} IS NULL OR #{item.delvdsr} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.delvdsr},'-','')), #{item.stkmemo}, IFNULL(#{item.restkyn}, 'N'), #{item.skustat}, #{item.rsncode}, #{item.parsnnm}, #{item.costrky}, #{item.costrit}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.btrcate}, IFNULL(#{item.fncusky},''), #{item.grossth}, IFNULL(#{item.equipky},''), IFNULL(#{item.demdman},''), IFNULL(#{item.demdadr},''), IFNULL(#{item.dempocd},''), IFNULL(#{item.demdtln},''), IFNULL(#{item.indimet}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.outdimt}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.serinum},1), IFNULL(#{item.savepos},''), IFNULL(#{item.schdate},''), IFNULL(#{item.mixload},'N'), IFNULL(#{item.desttrg},''), IFNULL(#{item.yardtrg},''), IFNULL(#{item.inbdate},''), IFNULL(#{item.inbvhnm},''), IFNULL(#{item.oubvhnm},''), IFNULL(#{item.shpdrnm},''), IFNULL(#{item.prsaldt},''), IFNULL(#{item.cmpdate},''), IFNULL(#{item.shppers},''), IFNULL(#{item.oubdate},''), IFNULL(#{item.preprde},''), IFNULL(#{item.arvdate},''), IFNULL(#{item.shpodat},''), IFNULL(#{item.trsodat},''), date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.update: /* updateWasnhdAsnpiyn */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WASNHD SET ASNPIYN = 'Y', LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky}

/* updateDoe024WasnitStatus */
UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WASNIT SET ASNITST = #{status},
ULLOCKY = #{data.ullocky},
TOAREKY = #{data.toareky},
TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky},
TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer},
EQUIPKY = #{data.equipky},
CUSTCOD = #{data.custcod},
CUSTNAM = #{data.custnam},
OWNERKY = #{data.ownerky},
OWNRNAM = #{data.ownrnam},
DESTORG = #{data.destorg},
DEORGNM = #{data.deorgnm},
DESTMOD = #{data.destmod},
DEMODNM = #{data.demodnm},
DEMPOCD = #{data.dempocd},
DEMDADR = #{data.demdadr},
DEMDMAN = #{data.demdman},
DEMDTLN = #{data.demdtln},
RSNCODE = #{data.rsncode},
PARSNNM = #{data.parsnnm},
RSNCODE = #{data.rcarscd},
PARSNNM = #{data.rcarsnm},
RCHSQTY = #{data.rchsqty},
MIXLOAD = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DEMODNM) FROM ${userData.schema}.WASNIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{data.warekey} AND EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract} WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}
AND EOASNIT = #{data.eoasnit}
AND ASNITST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWasnitStatus */
UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WASNIT SET ASNITST = #{status},
ULLOCKY = #{data.ullocky},
TOAREKY = #{data.toareky},
TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky},
TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer},
EQUIPKY = #{data.equipky},
RSNCODE = #{data.rsncode},
PARSNNM = #{data.parsnnm},
RSNCODE = #{data.rcarscd},
PARSNNM = #{data.rcarsnm},
RCHSQTY = #{data.rchsqty},
LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract} WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}
AND EOASNIT = #{data.eoasnit}
AND ASNITST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWasnhdVehicleEntranceInfo */
UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WASNHD WAS INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MWA ON MWA.WAREKEY = WAS.WAREKEY SET WAS.ENTDOYN = IF(MWA.CNTRLYN = 'Y', 'N' ,'Y'), WAS.ENTDATE = IF(#{data.entdate} IS NULL OR #{data.entdate} = '', date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d'), REPLACE(#{data.entdate}, '-', '')), WAS.ENTTIME = IF(#{data.enttime} IS NULL OR #{data.enttime} = '', date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), REPLACE(#{data.enttime}, ':', '')), WAS.LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), WAS.LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), WAS.LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, WAS.UPDTCHK = #{data.updtchk} + 1 WHERE WAS.WAREKEY = #{data.warekey} AND WAS.EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND WAS.UPDTCHK = #{data.updtchk}
mapper.select: /* selectEoasnky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_EOASNKY() AS `eoasnky` FROM DUAL
/* selectEoasnit */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_EOASNIT(#{eoasnky}) AS `eoasnit` FROM DUAL
mapper.update: /* updateAsnitstDoe027 */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WASNIT SET ASNITST = #{param.asnitst}, STLAYER = #{param.stlayer}, RSNCODE = #{param.rsncode}, PARSNNM = IFNULL(#{param.parsnnm},''), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND EOASNIT = #{param.eoasnit} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}

/* updateStritstDoe027 */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.OSTRIT SET STRITST = #{param.stritst}, RSNCODE = #{param.rsncode}, PARSNNM = IFNULL(#{param.parsnnm},''), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE COSTRKY = #{param.costrky} AND COSTRIT = #{param.costrit}

/* updateOstrhdDoe027 */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.OSTRHD SET STRSTAT = #{param.strstat}, PARSNNM = IFNULL(#{param.parsnnm},''), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE COSTRKY = #{param.costrky}
mapper.select:
/* getOstritList */ SELECT WAREKEY, COSTRKY, COSTRIT , OWNERKY, STRITST, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , STLAYER, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG , SKUTHIC, SUOMKEY, STROQTY, STRCQTY , CUSTCOD, ITEMCOD , PURCNUM, ORDERLN, STLOTNB, SKUSTAT , STRMEMO, RSNCODE, PARSNNM, CREDATE , CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME , LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.OSTRIT WHERE COSTRKY = #{param.costrky}
AND STRITST = #{param.stritst}
/* selectCostrky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_COSTRKY() AS `costrky` FROM dual
/* selectCostrit */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_COSTRIT(#{costrky}) AS `costrit` FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
/* insertOstrhdList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.OSTRHD(
COSTRKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, RSNCODE, PARSNNM, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, VHCFNAM, DRVERNM, STRSTAT, STRDATE, STRTIME,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{item.costrky}, #{item.warekey}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.rsncode}, #{item.parsnnm}, #{item.vownkey}, #{item.vehicky}, #{item.vhcfnam}, #{item.drvernm}, #{item.strstat}, DATE_FORMAT(#{item.strdate}, '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{item.strtime}, '%H:%i:%s'), '%H%i%s'), date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

/* insertOstritList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.OSTRIT(
COSTRKY, COSTRIT
, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM , POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, INVOICE , STRITST, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , STLAYER, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG , GROSSWG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, SKUTHIC , SUOMKEY, SKUSTRD, STROQTY, STRCQTY , CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM , REGIORG, DESTORG, DEORGNM , REGIMOD, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN , DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN , ADDCOKY , ITEMCOD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN , STLOTNB, BTRFSTC , SHPLIMT, DELVDSR , SKUSTAT, STRMEMO, RSNCODE, PARSNNM , DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BTRCATE, FNCUSKY
, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE , LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{item.costrky}, #{item.costrit} , #{item.warekey}, #{item.ownerky}, #{item.ownrnam} , REPLACE(#{item.poshpdt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{item.poshptm}, ':' ,''), #{item.poshpdy}, #{item.invoice} , #{item.stritst}, ( SELECT MG.SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG WHERE ((MG.MINLENG = 0 OR MG.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) AND (MG.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{item.skuleng} < MG.MAXLENG)) AND ((MG.MINWIDT = 0 OR MG.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) AND (MG.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.skuwidt} < MG.MAXWIDT)) AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' ), #{item.skumkey}, #{item.skudesc}, IFNULL(#{item.stlayer}, #{item.costrit}), #{item.skuweig}, #{item.skuwidt}, #{item.skuleng} , #{item.grosswg}, #{item.grosswd}, #{item.grossln}, #{item.skuthic} , #{item.suomkey}, #{item.skustrd}, #{item.stroqty}, #{item.strcqty} , #{item.custcod}, #{item.custnam} , #{item.regiorg}, #{item.destorg}, #{item.deorgnm}, IF(#{item.regimod} = '' OR #{item.regimod} IS NULL, #{item.regiorg}, #{item.regimod}) , IF(#{item.destmod} = '' OR #{item.destmod} IS NULL, #{item.destorg}, #{item.destmod}), IF(#{item.demodnm} = '' OR #{item.demodnm} IS NULL, #{item.deorgnm}, #{item.demodnm}), IF(#{item.destmod} = '' OR #{item.destmod} IS NULL, 'N', 'Y') , IFNULL(#{item.demdman}, ''), IFNULL(#{item.demdadr},''), IFNULL(#{item.dempocd},''), IFNULL(#{item.demdtln},'') , , #{item.itemcod}, #{item.purcnum}, #{item.orderln} , IFNULL(#{item.stlotnb},''), IFNULL(#{item.btrfstc},'') , IF(#{item.shplimt} IS NULL OR #{item.shplimt} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.shplimt}, '-', '')), IF(#{item.delvdsr} IS NULL OR #{item.delvdsr} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.delvdsr},'-','')) , #{item.skustat}, #{item.strmemo}, #{item.rsncode}, #{item.parsnnm} , #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.btrcate}, IFNULL(#{item.fncusky},'') , date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') , date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: /* selectStockky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_stockky() as stockky from dual
/* selectLotnmky */ select ${userData.schema}.fn_sm_lotnmky() as lotnmky from dual

/* getDoe033Layer */ SELECT IFNULL( (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN LOLAYER IS NULL OR LOLAYER = 0 OR LOLAYER = '' THEN 0 ELSE LOLAYER END) FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND AREAKEY = #{param.toareky} AND LOCAKEY = #{param.tolocky} LIMIT 1), 0) AS LOLAYER
mapper.update: /* saveDoe033Wtakit */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT SET STOCKKY = #{param.stockky}, LOTNMKY = #{param.lotnmky}, TCMPQTY = #{param.asndqty}, EQUIPKY = #{param.equipky}, TOLOCKY = #{param.tolocky}, TOLAYER = #{param.tolayer}, TASKSTS = #{param.tasksts}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND TASKOIT = #{param.taskoit} AND WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}
mapper.select: /* isAsnTaskAllOperCmp */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WASNHD WH ON WT.EOASNKY = WH.EOASNKY WHERE WT.TASKSTS IN ('NEW', 'OPERSTR', 'TASKCMP') AND WT.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky}

/* getWasnitUllockyGroupList */ SELECT WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT, WA.WAREKEY, WA.POSHPDT, WA.POSHPTM, WA.POSHPDY , WA.INVOICE, WA.DOCCATE, WA.DOCTYPE, WA.BTRCATE, WA.OWNERKY, WA.OWNRNAM , WA.ASNITST, WA.SKUGRKY, WA.SKUMKEY, WA.SKUDESC, WA.STLAYER, WA.SKUWEIG , WA.SKUWIDT, WA.SKULENG, WA.SKUTHIC, WA.GROSSWD, WA.GROSSLN, WA.GROSSWG , WA.GROSSTH, WA.SKUSTRD, WA.ULLOCKY, WA.EQUIPKY, WA.TOAREKY, WA.TOLOCKY , WA.TOLAYER, WA.SUOMKEY, WA.ADDCOKY, WA.ASNDQTY, WA.RCHSQTY, WA.CUSTCOD , WA.CUSTNAM, WA.FNCUSKY, WA.FCNAMLC, WA.REGIORG, WA.REGIMOD, WA.DESTORG , WA.DEORGNM, WA.DESTMOD, WA.DEMODNM, WA.DEMODYN, WA.DEMDMAN, WA.DEMDADR , WA.DEMPOCD, WA.DEMDTLN, WA.ITEMCOD, WA.PURCNUM, WA.ORDERLN, WA.BTRFSTC , WA.STLOTNB, WA.SHPLIMT, WA.STKMEMO, WA.DELVDSR, WA.RESTKYN, WA.SKUSTAT , WA.RSNCODE, WA.PARSNNM, WA.COSTRKY, WA.COSTRIT, WA.SERINUM, WA.SAVEPOS , WA.SCHDATE, WA.MIXLOAD, WA.DESTTRG, WA.YARDTRG, WA.INBDATE, WA.INBVHNM , WA.OUBVHNM, WA.SHPDRNM, WA.PRSALDT, WA.CMPDATE, WA.SHPPERS, WA.OUBDATE , WA.PREPRDE, WA.ARVDATE, WA.SHPODAT, WA.TRSODAT, WA.INDIMET, WA.OUTDIMT , WR.RCVDCKY, WR.RCVDCIT , WA.CREDATE, WA.CRETIME, WA.CREUSER, WA.LMODATE, WA.LMOTIME, WA.LMOUSER , WA.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WASNIT WA INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WRCVIT WR ON WR.EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY AND WR.EOASNIT = WA.EOASNIT WHERE WA.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WA.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND WA.ULLOCKY = #{param.ullocky} AND WA.TOAREKY = #{param.toareky} AND WR.RCVITST != 'CANCEL' ORDER BY WA.STLAYER DESC
/* selectRcvdcky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_RCVDCKY() AS `rcvdcky` FROM DUAL
/* selectRcvdcit */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_IM_RCVDCIT(#{rcvdcky}) AS `rcvdcit` FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
/* insertWrcvhd */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WRCVHD(
RCVDCKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, PASTRKY, RCVDCST, RCVRSCD, RCVRSNM, RCARSCD, RCARSNM, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, VHCFNAM, DRVERNM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{param.rcvdcky}, #{param.warekey}, #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.pastrky}, #{param.rcvdcst}, #{param.rcvrscd}, #{param.rcvrsnm}, #{param.rcarscd}, #{param.rcarsnm}, #{param.vownkey}, #{param.vehicky}, #{param.vhcfnam}, #{param.drvernm}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

/* insertWrcvitList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WRCVIT(
RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT,
POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, INVOICE, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, RCVITST, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKULENG, SKUWIDT, SKUTHIC, SKUWEIG, GROSSWG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSTH, STLAYER, REGIORG, DEORGNM, REGIMOD, DEMODNM, ULLOCKY, ADDCOKY, SKUSTRD, RESTKYN, TOAREKY, TOLOCKY, TOLAYER, ITEMCOD, STLOTNB, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, ASNDQTY, RCHSQTY, SUOMKEY, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, EOASNKY, EOASNIT, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, RCVRSCD, RCVRSNM, BTRCATE, SERINUM, SAVEPOS, SCHDATE, MIXLOAD, DESTTRG, YARDTRG, INBDATE, INBVHNM, OUBVHNM, SHPDRNM, PRSALDT, CMPDATE, PREPRDE, ARVDATE, SHPODAT, TRSODAT, INDIMET, OUTDIMT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, EQUIPKY, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{item.rcvdcky}, #{item.rcvdcit},
REPLACE(#{item.poshpdt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{item.poshptm}, ':', ''), #{item.poshpdy}, #{item.invoice}, #{item.warekey}, #{item.ownerky}, #{item.ownrnam}, #{item.rcvitst}, #{item.custcod}, #{item.custnam}, ( SELECT MG.SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG WHERE ((MG.MINLENG = 0 OR MG.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) AND (MG.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{item.skuleng} < MG.MAXLENG)) AND ((MG.MINWIDT = 0 OR MG.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) AND (MG.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.skuwidt} < MG.MAXWIDT)) AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' ), #{item.skumkey}, #{item.skudesc}, #{item.skuleng}, #{item.skuwidt}, #{item.skuthic}, #{item.skuweig}, #{item.grosswg}, #{item.grossln}, #{item.grosswd}, #{item.grossth}, IFNULL(#{item.stlayer}, #{item.eoasnit}), #{item.regiorg}, #{item.deorgnm}, #{item.regimod}, #{item.demodnm}, #{item.ullocky}, , #{item.skustrd}, IFNULL(#{item.restkyn}, 'N'), #{item.toareky}, #{item.tolocky}, #{item.tolayer}, #{item.itemcod}, #{item.stlotnb}, #{item.purcnum}, #{item.orderln}, IF(#{item.rcvdcdt} IS NULL OR #{item.rcvdcdt} = '', date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), REPLACE(#{item.rcvdcdt}, '-', '')), IF(#{item.rcvdctm} IS NULL OR #{item.rcvdctm} = '', date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), REPLACE(#{item.rcvdctm}, ':', '')), 1, 0, #{item.suomkey}, IF(#{item.shplimt} IS NULL OR #{item.shplimt} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.shplimt}, '-','')), IF(#{item.delvdsr} IS NULL OR #{item.delvdsr} = '', '', REPLACE(#{item.delvdsr}, '-','')), IFNULL(#{item.btrfstc},''), #{item.eoasnky}, #{item.eoasnit}, #{item.costrky}, #{item.costrit}, #{item.rcvrscd}, #{item.rcvrsnm}, #{item.btrcate}, #{item.serinum}, #{item.savepos}, #{item.schdate}, #{item.mixload}, #{item.desttrg}, #{item.yardtrg}, #{item.inbdate}, #{item.inbvhnm}, #{item.oubvhnm}, #{item.shpdrnm}, #{item.prsaldt}, #{item.cmpdate}, #{item.preprde}, #{item.arvdate}, #{item.shpodat}, #{item.trsodat}, #{item.indimet}, #{item.outdimt}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.equipky}, #{item.demdman}, #{item.demdadr}, #{item.dempocd}, #{item.demdtln},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

/* insertWtakitList */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WTAKIT(
TASKOKY, TASKOIT,
WAREKEY, TASKDAT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, TASKSTS, LOTNMKY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER, TOAREKY, TOLOCKY, TOLAYER, EQUIPKY, FORDQTY, TCMPQTY, ALLGRKY, PARSNCD, PARSNNM, PKRSNCD, PKRSNNM, STOCKKY, EOASNKY, EOASNIT, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT,
MVSTDAT, MVSTTIM, MVEDDAT, MVEDTIM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{item.taskoky}, #{item.taskoit},
#{item.warekey}, #{item.taskdat}, #{item.doccate}, #{item.doctype}, #{item.tasksts}, #{item.lotnmky}, #{item.ownerky}, #{item.ownrnam}, #{item.custcod}, #{item.custnam}, #{item.skumkey}, #{item.skudesc}, #{item.frareky}, #{item.frlocky}, #{item.frlayer}, #{item.toareky}, #{item.tolocky}, #{item.tolayer}, #{item.equipky}, #{item.fordqty}, #{item.tcmpqty}, #{item.allgrky}, #{item.parsncd}, #{item.parsnnm}, #{item.pkrsncd}, #{item.pkrsnnm}, #{item.stockky}, #{item.eoasnky}, #{item.eoasnit}, #{item.costrky}, #{item.costrit}, #{item.rcvdcky}, #{item.rcvdcit}, #{item.outboky}, #{item.outboit}, #{item.shpdcky}, #{item.shpdcit},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'),
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD ( WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY , DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, LOADKEY, APROVYN , MIXCUYN , VHCMAXW , VHPDATE, VHPTIME, TPNSTAT , DRVERNM , DRVERPH , APROVDT, APROVTM , STPITDT, STPITTM , TRNINDT, TRNINTM , CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.warekey}, #{param.vhplnky}, #{param.vownkey}, #{param.vehicky} , #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.loadkey}, #{param.aprovyn} , ( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${userInfo.schema}.WASNIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND MIXLOAD = 'Y') > 0 THEN 'Y' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DEMODNM) FROM ${userInfo.schema}.WASNIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky}) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) , (SELECT VHCMAXW FROM ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVHCMA WHERE VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky}) , REPLACE(#{param.asndate}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{param.asntime}, ':', ''), 'FINISH' , #{param.drvernm} , (SELECT DRVERPH FROM ${userInfo.commonSchema}.MVHCMA WHERE VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky}) , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),'HH24MISS') , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),'HH24MISS') , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),'HH24MISS') , #{userInfo.useract}, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),'HH24MISS'), #{userInfo.useract} )
mapper.select: /* getPhyCreateApiData */ SELECT WS.SKUMKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER as STLAYER , WS.STOCKKY, WS.SKUGRKY, MGR.GRPKYNM, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUDESC , WS.ITEMCOD, MCO.COMCDTX, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKUTHIC, WS.STKSTAT as SKUSTAT FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MGR ON MGR.SKUGRKY = WS.SKUGRKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCO ON MCO.COMCDVL = WS.ITEMCOD AND MCO.COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' WHERE WS.STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND WS.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}
